functions.name: _global_auth_dir
functions.description: 返回全局 zchat auth 存储目录（~/.zchat/）

functions.name: get_username
functions.signature: def get_username(base_dir: str | None = None) -> str
functions.description: 从 auth.json 读取用户名（绕过 token 过期检查）

functions.name: save_token
functions.description: 保存 token 数据到 auth.json（权限 0600）

functions.name: load_cached_token
functions.description: 加载缓存 token（检查过期，过期返回 None）

functions.name: discover_oidc_endpoints
functions.signature: def discover_oidc_endpoints(issuer: str, client: httpx.Client | None = None) -> dict
functions.description: 从 issuer 获取 OIDC discovery 文档

functions.name: _print_qr
functions.description: 使用 segno 打印 QR 码到终端

functions.name: _sanitize_irc_nick
functions.description: 清理字符串为合法 IRC nick（RFC 2812）

functions.name: _extract_username
functions.description: 从 OIDC userinfo 提取用户名（username > preferred_username > email > sub）

functions.name: device_code_flow
functions.signature: def device_code_flow(issuer: str, client_id: str, http_client: httpx.Client | None = None) -> dict
functions.description: 运行完整 OIDC device code 流程

functions.name: refresh_token_if_needed
functions.signature: def refresh_token_if_needed(base_dir: str, token_endpoint: str, client_id: str, http_client: httpx.Client | None = None) -> dict | None
functions.description: 使用 refresh_token 刷新 access token

functions.name: get_credentials
functions.signature: def get_credentials(base_dir: str | None = None, client_id: str = '', http_client: httpx.Client | None = None) -> tuple[str, str] | None
functions.description: 返回 (username, access_token)，自动刷新过期 token
